content:
Put the yellow circle inside the blue rectangle.
The circle must be completely contained within the rectangle.

content.text: I'll help you put the yellow circle inside the blue rectangle. Let me first take a screenshot to see the current state of the page.

I can see a blue rectangle on the left side and a yellow circle on the right side of the canvas. I need to drag the yellow circle to place it inside the blue rectangle. I'll click on the center of the yellow circle and drag it to a position inside the blue rectangle.

Perfect! I've successfully moved the yellow circle inside the blue rectangle. The circle is now completely contained within the rectangle boundaries. The task has been completed - the yellow circle is centered within the blue rectangle and is fully inside its bounds.
